subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 10
subcodes.first_line: My hair is My Phoenix. Therefore hath it set itself upon the blazing fire of My Face and receiveth sustenance
subcodes.first_line_orig: شعری سمندری لذا استقر علی نار خدی و یرعی فی ریاض وجهی و هذا مقام الذی خلع ابن
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @fire and light; fire and water, @symbolism
